name: abandoned-cart
description: 3-email sequence for users who clicked pricing but didn't buy

emails.subject_A: Did you have questions about the Masterclass?
emails.subject_B: Still thinking about it? I'm here to help
emails.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed you checked out the AI Automation Masterclass. Awesome!

Then... nothing. That's okay. Big decisions take time.

**Common Questions I Get:**

**Q: Is this right for my skill level?**
A: If you can copy-paste, you can do this. No coding required.

**Q: How much time does it take?**
A: 1-2 hours to complete the course. Then 30 min to set up each automation.

**Q: What if it doesn't work for me?**
A: 100% money-back guarantee. Build 3 automations. If you don't save 10+ hours/week, full refund.

**Q: Is $97 worth it?**
A: If it saves you 20 hours/month, and your time is worth $25/hour, that's $500/month value. You decide.

**Got other questions?** Hit reply. I'll personally answer.

[Enroll Now for $97]({{course_link}})

- n0mad

P.S. The 67% discount ends soon. After that, it's $297.

emails.subject_A: 🎁 Bonus: I'll Set Up Your First Automation (Free)
emails.subject_B: Special Deal: Let Me Build Your First Automation
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

Still on the fence about the Masterclass?

I get it. You want proof this works.

**Here's my offer:**

Enroll today, and I'll personally set up your first automation for you. FREE.

**What I'll Build:**
- Your choice: Content automation, email sequence, or lead gen system
- 30-minute 1-on-1 call
- I'll screen-share and build it with you
- You keep the automation forever

**Value: $297**
**Your Cost: $0** (just enroll in the course)

**Why Am I Doing This?**

Because once you see it work, you'll build 10 more. That's how automation works - one success leads to another.

**This Offer:**
- Only for the next 20 people
- Must enroll within 24 hours
- Reply "AUTOMATION" after enrolling to claim

[Enroll + Get Free Setup]({{course_link}})

Let me prove this to you,
n0mad

P.S. I'm limiting this to 20 people because I physically can't do more. First come, first served.

emails.subject_A: Honest question: What's holding you back?
emails.subject_B: Can I ask why you didn't join?
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

I'll be direct.

You looked at the Masterclass. You didn't buy.

That's fine - but I want to know why.

**Was it:**
- Too expensive?
- Not convinced it would work?
- Bad timing?
- Something else?

Hit reply and tell me. Seriously.

If there's something I got wrong in how I explained it, I want to fix that.

And if it's just not right for you, that's okay too. No hard feelings.

**But if the only thing stopping you is doubt...**

Remember:
- 100% money-back guarantee
- Lifetime access + updates
- Private community support
- Proven system (50+ success stories)

[Give It a Shot (67% Off)]({{course_link}})

Whatever you decide, I appreciate you being here.

n0mad

P.S. This is my last email about the Masterclass. I won't bug you again. Promise.
